Interface ISpectralSample2

Provides access to a SpectralSample Interface.

[Guid("D2CE5A40-0326-44F9-A99D-2A044462146F")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISpectralSample2 : ISpectralSample
